## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and why is it hard today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it maps to a phase in `PLAN.md`, note which.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Links, references, or screenshots.
